name: trial_04_barren_plateaus
deck_claim: Var[∂F/∂θ] ∝ 1/2^n; for QAOA this manifests as the cost-at-random-init concentrating tighter around its mean as p grows. (McClean et al. 2018)
verdict_text: PASS — deeper-half min variance (1.5383e+02) < shallow-half min variance (1.8713e+02). Cost concentrates as the ansatz becomes more random, the barren-plateau fingerprint.
